message:
fix(tests): clean up clippy warnings in test code

- Add let_underscore_must_use allow in grapheme_pool tests
- Convert if-panic to assert! in metrics.rs and assertions.rs
- Use let _ = to explicitly discard alloc() returns

Reduces test warnings from 507 to 501 (part of bd-1bzf).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
